agent_system.coordination_style: governance digital twin with policy-as-code, permission boundaries, shadow route simulation, verifier coverage, rollback planning, incident replay, and validation-gated RSI releases

benchmark_public.data_boundary: synthetic/redacted-style public benchmark; no private customer data
benchmark_public.name: Capability Governance Twin benchmark

proof_type: Autonomous RSI Capability Governance Twin Proof
public_boundary: Benchmark-capital-equivalent values are not live revenue, customer results, financial guarantees, legal advice, audit certification, policy advice, token advice, medical advice, or proof of achieved superintelligence.

rsi_releases.lesson: seed static governance policy before twin-based RSI

safe_interpretation: A deterministic benchmark proof that SkillOS can test capability routing in a governance digital twin before release, enforcing policy, permissions, verifier coverage, rollback, observability, and validation-gated RSI. Not live revenue, customer results, financial advice, legal advice, audit certification, policy advice, medical advice, token advice, or achieved superintelligence.

skills_used.input_signal: domain state, skills, policies, capacity, risk register
skills_used.name: Governance Twin Construction
skills_used.purpose: Builds a deterministic shadow model of the capability network before production release.

skills_used.input_signal: policy text, compliance boundary, public claim boundary
skills_used.name: Policy-as-Code Compilation
skills_used.purpose: Converts governance boundaries into machine-checkable policy constraints.

skills_used.name: Permission Boundary Mapping
skills_used.purpose: Maps each route to allowed skills, agents, tools, and data scopes.

skills_used.name: Shadow Route Simulation
skills_used.purpose: Runs candidate capability routes in the twin before production promotion.

skills_used.name: Verifier Coverage Allocation
skills_used.purpose: Allocates verifier courts to high-risk and high-value routes.

skills_used.input_signal: policy constraints, permission boundary, route plan
skills_used.name: Policy Violation Detection
skills_used.purpose: Rejects candidate routes that violate policy, access, or disclosure constraints.

skills_used.name: Rollback Path Planning
skills_used.purpose: Ensures a safe containment or reversal path exists before release.

skills_used.input_signal: incident traces, proposed update, drift state
skills_used.name: Incident Counterfactual Replay
skills_used.purpose: Replays past incidents and near misses against candidate protocol updates.

skills_used.input_signal: SLA pressure, capacity fit, latency sensitivity
skills_used.name: SLA Stress Testing
skills_used.purpose: Tests latency, capacity, quality, and verifier timing under load.

skills_used.name: Drift Monitor
skills_used.purpose: Detects divergence between the governance twin and observed production-like traces.

skills_used.input_signal: weak controls, red-team pressure, threat model
skills_used.name: Red-Team Scenario Synthesis
skills_used.purpose: Generates adversarial policy, permission, and reliability scenarios.

skills_used.input_signal: validation score, policy violation rate, risk breach rate
skills_used.name: Control Plane Release Gating
skills_used.purpose: Promotes only updates that improve validation metrics without policy or risk regression.

skills_used.input_signal: route trace, skill IDs, verifier receipts
skills_used.name: Provenance Binding
skills_used.purpose: Binds skills, routes, policies, verifier decisions, and receipts into a replayable chain.

skills_used.name: Observability Plan
skills_used.purpose: Defines the telemetry required to detect failure, drift, and policy gaps.

skills_used.name: Capacity / Cost Control
skills_used.purpose: Balances verifier coverage and routing capacity against cost pressure.

skills_used.name: Cross-Domain Policy Transfer
skills_used.purpose: Transfers proven policy and verifier patterns across adjacent domains.

skills_used.name: Control Gap Mining
skills_used.purpose: Turns failed gates and incidents into new verifier, policy, or skill backlog items.

skills_used.name: Executive Twin Receipt Rendering
skills_used.purpose: Renders twin results, skills used, gates, controls, and public receipts for review.

workflow: Autonomous RSI Capability Governance Twin Proof
